violations.description: CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw beef noted above cooked uncovered ground beef. Raw meats are not to be stored above cooked/ready-to-eat foods. Raw meats are to be stored according to required final cooking temperature as follows from bottom to top: chicken beef pork seafood and all pre-cooked/ready-to-eat items on the top. Corrected by removing meats to proper locations and training on the topic.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in kitchen.
PREMISES (1 pts): Employee coats noted not properly located. Please store clothing coats and personal items away from food storage and food contact surfaces.

HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the womens toilet toilet room. Paper towels were replaced to correct the violation.
PREMISES (1 pts): Employee coat/shirts noted not properly located. Please store clothing coats and personal items away from food storage and food contact surfaces.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): Scoop in the rice bucket noted with the scoop handle laying the rice. Scoop and food utensil handles should be stored so the handle does not contact the food product.
